subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and becometh the Lord of the Kingdom and the Sovereign of the Celestial Realm, Who, through the key of the Most Great Name, hath unlocked the Gate of Utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک ملکوت و سلطان جبروت را لایق و سزاست که بمفتاح اسم اعظم باب بیان را گشود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
